title: EquityTypeEnum
description: Represents an enumeration list to identify the type of Equity.

oneOf.title: ConvertiblePreference
oneOf.description: Identifies an Equity of Convertible Preference, a stock which can be converted into a predetermined number of common shares and holds priority to receive capital return in event of issuer liquidation.

oneOf.title: DepositaryReceipt
oneOf.description: Identifies a negotiable depositary receipt certificate issued by a bank representing shares in a foreign company traded on a local stock exchange.

oneOf.title: NonConvertiblePreference
oneOf.description: Identifies an Equity of Non-Convertible Preference, Shares which hold priority to receive capital return in event of issuer liquidation.

oneOf.title: Ordinary
oneOf.description: Identifies an Equity of Common stocks and shares.
